channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Asus ProArt PZ14 review: This surprisingly powerful tablet PC transformed my creative workflow
item.description: This tablet PC is not just for browsing the internet and editing; it features a full version of Windows and, combined with a powerful AI CPU, offers a complete solution.

item.title: A warning sign about AI’s real cost, courtesy of Google and Amazon
item.description: AI has made it a lot harder for tech companies like Amazon and Google to deliver on their net-zero pledges.

item.title: Despite the backlash, Donald Trump is using AI again
item.description: Trump’s Truth Social feed is filling with AI-generated posts, including fake celebrities, Teddy Roosevelt, and a golden eagle.

item.title: Cette exoplanète proche de nous réunit plusieurs indices qui relancent l’espoir de trouver de la vie
item.description: À seulement 25 années-lumière de la Terre, une exoplanète intrigue les astronomes : située dans la zone habitable, elle pourrait réunir les conditions propices à la vie… si elle n’a pas déjà perdu l’essentiel.

item.title: Tesla lance la Model Y L Premium à six places aux États-Unis, avant son arrivée en France
item.description: La grande Tesla Model Y déjà vendue en Chine, au Japon ou en Australie débarque aux États-Unis. Mais elle troque son nom de Model Y L contre autre chose.

item.title: Austin Evans says the biggest creator mindset shift is learning to think beyond the next video
item.description: Tech creator Austin Evans reflects on 17 years on YouTube, building a team, using AI, and the metrics that matter now.

item.title: Sony’s ditching game discs for the PlayStation, but fans are still hungry for physical media
item.description: With the classic video game format on the line after Sony’s controversial announcement, gamers are kickstarting their own revival. Grand Theft Auto 6 is the most anticipated game of the year (and perhaps of the decade, given the agonizing wait since the franchise’s last entry in 2013). But earlier this week, rumors started swirling that Rockstar Games would release the title via digital download only, with physical copies of Grand Theft Auto 6 being reduced to a box with a download code inside rather than a game disc....

item.title: « Demain, vous paierez sans jamais rien posséder » : Mélenchon veut une loi pour sauver les jeux vidéo physiques
item.description: Jean-Luc Mélenchon veut faire des jeux vidéo un bien culturel protégé par la loi, et promet un chantier législatif en 2027. Derrière la sortie, un vrai débat : à l'ère du tout-numérique, achète-t-on encore ce qu'on paie ?

item.title: Meta quietly launches vibe-coded gaming app Pocket
item.description: Meta has quietly launched Pocket, an experimental AI app that lets users generate and share interactive mini games using text prompts.

item.title: I saw Miami's ‘lap of chaos’ in 2025, and after seeing this year's new Lego go-karts at Silverstone I know which event I'm most excited for this Sunday
item.description: Lego is back at the F1 with 22 new cars, and I couldn’t be more excited

item.title: Travel app Hopper to pay $35M in FTC settlement over ‘unfairly’ charging hidden fees
item.description: Hopper will pay $35 million to settle FTC allegations that it used deceptive “dark patterns” to hide fees and mislead travelers about the costs and benefits of services.

item.title: Gifts for the students gearing up for college
item.description: Back-to-school gifts for college students must be equal parts practical and fun, logical and thrilling. A big emphasis on tech, with some cozy options as well.

item.title: Anthropic is discussing a new custom chip with Samsung
item.description: The news comes about a week after OpenAI announced its own custom AI chip in a partnership with Broadcom.

item.title: Spotify Confirms Streaming Fraud After Kalshi Trader Cries Foul
item.description: One of Kalshi’s most prominent traders tells WIRED he’s swearing off Spotify-related markets until the issue is resolved.

item.title: I tested the affordable Ruko U11Mini 4K drone — and it's no match for DJI's new flyer
item.description: Decent 4K video and a solid touchscreen controller can't save the Ruko U11Mini 4K from its many frustrations — and with the DJI Lito 1 available for the same money, there's little reason to settle for second best.

item.title: It’s time to rethink your operating model
item.description: C-suite leaders agree it’s time to reinvent their organization and share why enterprise-wide agility is hard to achieve. We hear a lot about the importance of agility in today’s business environment. But what does that mean in practice? My organization, Project Management Institute, recently set out to answer that exact question, surveying more than 700 C-suite leaders to develop a manifesto that not only defines enterprise agility but also identifies tradeoffs that provide organizations with a clear roadmap for achieving it....

item.title: Weber marks down grills and griddles to their best prices ever for July 4th
item.description: If our recent Decoder interview with Weber Blackstone CEO Roger Dahle has you craving freshly grilled meats or veggies, Weber just so happens to have a variety of grills, smokers, griddles, and accessories selling at big discounts ahead of the July 4th holiday. It makes a bunch of models, but we’ve landed on a range […]

item.title: The Supreme Court’s strangest media tradition is still running
item.description: Why do Supreme Court interns still run paper rulings to the media? Behind the viral 'running of the interns' tradition

item.title: Can Cursor Remain a Platform for OpenAI and Anthropic’s Models Inside SpaceX?
item.description: Cursor hopes to continue offering third-party AI models after it's acquired by SpaceX, testing the relationships between frontier AI labs.

item.title: AI astroturfing videos are here
item.description: It’s not just politicians starring in deepfakes these days. AI is being used to create fake everyday citizens pushing manufactured political opinions. It’s a new, cheaper form of astroturfing. The best defense is looking for signs of AI and slowing down before you share. It’s not just politicians starring in deepfakes these days. AI is being used to create fake everyday citizens pushing manufactured political opinions. It’s a new, cheaper form of astroturfing. The best defense is looking for signs of AI and slowing down before you share. ...

item.title: Stop working on a single screen on the road — this AOC laptop extender deal is a game-changer for business travel
item.description: A pair of 14-inch 1080P FHD IPS panels that clip onto your laptop for an instant triple-screen productivity.

item.title: Tesla Q2 vehicle deliveries are up 25 percent over last year
item.description: The company has been gaining traction in Europe.
